name: @oscli-dev/oscli
description: The last CLI framework you'll reach for.

scripts.build: bun build packages/oscli/src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --splitting && bun tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.benchmark: bun build packages/oscli/src/index.ts --outdir /tmp/oscli-bench --target node --format esm --splitting --analyze && echo 'Entry point size:' && ls -lh /tmp/oscli-bench/index.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run test && bun run build

author: Aidan McAlister
